top_tweets.text:
The Head of Claude Code at Anthropic said he hasn’t written code by hand in months.

In 2 days he shipped 49 full features. All written 100% by AI.

He just dropped a 30 min talk on exactly how he does it.

Worth more than any $500 vibe coding course. Bookmark it: https://t.co/gszR7kYJCL
top_tweets.author: EvanLuthra
top_tweets.name: Evan Luthra
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic Claude Code 負責人分享他已數月未手寫程式碼，兩天內靠 AI 完成 49 項功能。他公開 30 分鐘演講詳述具體作法，被認為比付費課程更有價值。

top_tweets.text:
hey anthropic

i dare you

top_tweets.summary_zh: 開發者挑戰 Anthropic：若真要展示模型能力，不如直接複製整套 Adobe Creative Suite。

top_tweets.text: It’s never been easier to design your dream house
top_tweets.author: aaron_epstein
top_tweets.name: Aaron Epstein
top_tweets.summary_zh: 引用 Drafted 工具示範：使用者只需勾勒任意形狀，AI 即可將其轉化為真實房屋平面圖，讓設計自己理想住宅變得前所未有地簡單。

context.quoted_text:
Outline any shape and Drafted turns it into a real house plan. 🏠

It's a new way to explore the different layouts and room configurations that are possible within your space.

Here's how it works 👇 https://t.co/fn2l7KjsI5

top_tweets.text: Game design question: How do you add tension to a creepy liminal environment WITHOUT adding monsters, but WITHOUT removing tension if the player realizes they face no real threat? https://t.co/PRg5Ji2T6Z
top_tweets.author: BluebriarArts
top_tweets.name: ❥ hazel ︻デ═一
top_tweets.summary_zh: 遊戲設計討論：如何在詭異的 liminal 環境中製造張力，但不加入怪物、也不讓玩家因意識到沒有真實威脅而失去緊張感？回覆中提出環境敘事、聲音設計、時間壓力等多種手法。

top_tweets.text:
Meet Kimi K2.6 agent - Video hero section, WebGL shaders, real backends. From one prompt.

🔹 Video hero sections - cinematic aesthetic, auto-composited 
🔹 WebGL shader animations - native GLSL / WGSL, liquid metal, caustics, raymarching 
🔹 Motion design - GSAP + Framer Motion https://t.co/LOoym6Crtf
top_tweets.author: Kimi_Moonshot
top_tweets.name: Kimi.ai
top_tweets.summary_zh: Kimi K2.6 agent 展示從單一提示詞即可生成影片 hero section、WebGL shader 動畫（液態金屬、焦散、光線行進）、GSAP + Framer Motion 動效及真實後端。

top_tweets.text: BREAKING: Vibe-coding platform Lovable reportedly suffered a breach that exposed users’ AI chat histories, source code, & database credentials.
top_tweets.author: Polymarket
top_tweets.name: Polymarket
top_tweets.summary_zh: Vibe-coding 平台 Lovable 傳出資料外洩事件，使用者的 AI 對話記錄、原始碼及資料庫憑證遭曝光。

top_tweets.author: vxunderground
top_tweets.name: vx-underground
top_tweets.summary_zh: Lovable（估值 50 億美元的 EU vibe coding 新創）在三月初被通報安全漏洞可看到所有人的 prompts，官方回應後仍於近期發生重大資料外洩。

top_tweets.text:
bros: vibe coding is so easy bro

also bros: googling how to rotate every env variable across their vibe coded apps on a Sunday because Vercel got breached and now every API key of theirs could be on a forum https://t.co/f8yQib5B7L
top_tweets.author: kloss_xyz
top_tweets.name: klöss
top_tweets.summary_zh: 諷刺 vibe coding 使用者：平常說 vibe coding 很簡單，但 Vercel 被駭後的週日卻得 Google 如何輪換所有 vibe coded app 的環境變數，因為每組 API key 都可能已外洩到論壇。

top_tweets.text:
BREAKING: Today, we pulled the plug on vibe coding.

I just witnessed my Mac erase a $31B company in 184 seconds.

This is beyond absurd. https://t.co/qgxwGWEnYF
top_tweets.author: shipper_now
top_tweets.name: Shipper
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者聲稱親眼目睹 Mac 在 184 秒內摧毀一家市值 310 億美元的公司，因此停用 vibe coding，認為情況已超乎尋常。

top_tweets.text:
This really works good, I’ve started to run:

/ui-ux-pro-max
/make-interfaces-feel-better
/simplify

After every major design changes, works like a charm.
top_tweets.author: ParthJadhav8
top_tweets.name: Parth Jadhav
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者在每次重大設計變更後會執行 /ui-ux-pro-max、/make-interfaces-feel-better、/simplify 等指令，認為效果極佳。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: QA Crow
top_products.author: Ryan Merket
top_products.tagline: A murder of crows for your bug backlog
top_products.summary_zh: 協助開發團隊管理與處理 bug 待辦清單的測試工具，透過自動化方式加速問題追蹤與修復流程。

top_products.title: EchoTube
top_products.author: Aditya Yadav
top_products.tagline: Fast, private Open Source YouTube client
top_products.summary_zh: 一款開源的 YouTube 客戶端，強調快速載入與隱私保護，適合重視資料安全的使用者。

top_products.title: GalaxyBrain
top_products.author: Jon Wheatley
top_products.tagline: An information operating system powered by local files
top_products.summary_zh: 以本地檔案為基礎的資訊管理系統，讓使用者能有效組織與檢索個人知識庫。

top_products.title: Claude Desktop Buddy
top_products.author: Zac Zuo
top_products.tagline: Bring Claude into the physical world with maker hardware
top_products.summary_zh: 透過硬體裝置將 Claude AI 助理帶入實體世界，適合創客與硬體愛好者打造互動專案。

top_products.title: SuperBrain
top_products.author: Siddharth Shinde
top_products.tagline: Self-hosted, AI-powered second brain for Android
top_products.summary_zh: Android 平台上的自架式 AI 筆記系統，作為個人第二大腦協助管理與連結知識內容。

top_products.title: Let's Barter
top_products.author: Yash Gupta
top_products.tagline: Why buy when you can Barter?
top_products.summary_zh: 以物易物的交易平台，讓使用者透過交換物品取代金錢購買。
